mechanism_narrative: A 5% increase in industrial production over the previous month signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 10% decline in housing starts over the previous month signals a weakening supply environment that reduces new capacity additions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 50-basis-point increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 5% increase in real GDP over the previous quarter signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 10% decline in housing starts over the previous month signals a weakening supply environment that reduces new capacity additions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 50-basis-point increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)
